text: Computer vision is a field of artificial intelligence that enables computers to interpret and understand visual information from the world, such as photos and videos. Two key tasks in computer vision are image recognition, which identifies what an image contains, and object detection, which locates specific objects within an image. These technologies have many practical applications. For example, in self-driving cars, computer vision systems detect pedestrians, traffic signs, and other vehicles to navigate safely. Other uses include facial recognition for security, medical imaging to diagnose diseases, and automated quality control in factories.
